ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the payment of the invoice */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total amount due on the invoice */,
  "invoice_no" TEXT /* Invoice number assigned to the invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who is billed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice items or services */,
  "purchase_order_no" TEXT /* Reference to the related purchase order */,
  "business_unit_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the business unit that generated the invoice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the invoice */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount associated with the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the invoice */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., Net 30, Net 60) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the invoice amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer for billing communications */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City part of the billing address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State part of the billing address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the billing address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the billing address */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the customer record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the customer record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "order_no" TEXT /* Purchase order number assigned to the order */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related invoice */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the purchase order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the purchase order (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the purchase order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the purchase order was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the purchase order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the purchase order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice for which the payment is made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was received */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid towards the invoice */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was recorded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the payment record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment record was last updated */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or note associated with the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice (e.g., Paid, Overdue, Pending) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the status entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the status entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_status_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_status_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, manager) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice that has been changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change that occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
